rationale: Both papers are centrally about product-harm crises and consumer-market outcomes: the citing study examines within-brand spillover effects on VW used-car willingness to pay, while the cited 2000 JMR paper is a core product-harm crisis study on brand-equity effects and consumer expectations. Given the citing note explicitly says it extends prior product-harm crisis research with mixed evidence, this citation is plausibly foundational/theory-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention.
